name: edgecase-mcq-platformer
author: Prateek
description: A desktop MCQ platformer MVP for Steam-oriented PC publishing.

scripts.dev:no-sandbox: npx concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env ELECTRON_START_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron --no-sandbox ."
scripts.package:win: npm run clean:release && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis
scripts.package:linux: npm run clean:release && npm run build && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb
scripts.package:mac: npm run clean:release && npm run build && electron-builder --mac dmg zip
scripts.package:all: npm run clean:release && npm run build && electron-builder -wlm
scripts.package:dir: npm run clean:release && npm run build && electron-builder --dir
